should_trigger: Audit my installed Pi skills and report stale or duplicate skill scopes
Inventory enabled and installed skills and produce a read-only prune plan
Find overlapping skill descriptions before I publish the skill packages
should_not_trigger: Draft a new reusable skill from these troubleshooting notes
Evaluate one SKILL.md for frontmatter and safety issues
Append a local memory note for repo-explorer

ambiguous.prompt: Run a quality gate over all enabled skills and tell me which ones need work
ambiguous.decision: Use skill-evaluator for structural pass/warn/fail quality gates; use skill-bank-manager for inventory, overlap, lifecycle, and prune/merge planning.
ambiguous.reason: Both inspect skills, but the bank manager focuses on lifecycle inventory while the evaluator focuses on contract validation.

notes: Lifecycle inventory and plan-only skill-bank management should route here.
